Kritisk - Blokkerer tilgang
Alvorlig - Store barrierer
Moderat - Betydelige problemer
Mindre - Bør forbedres

27

Resultater per side

Yara | Leader in crop nutrition, ammonia and industrial solutions

https://www.yara.com/
Avvik: 83 | Bestått: 445
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to Crop nutrition'

<a href="/crop-nutrition/">Go to Crop nutrition</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to Industrial solutions'

<a href="/this-is-yara/yara-industrial-solutions/">Go to Industrial solutions</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to Yara Clean Ammonia'

<a href="/yara-clean-ammonia/">Go to Yara Clean Ammonia</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (103 characters)

<a class="link-unstyled" href="/corporate-releases/reminder-program-for-the-publication-of-yara-international-asa-fourth-quarter-2025-results/" target="_self" title="Reminder: Program for the publicat
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (11 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (66 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQ4GDCJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="modal-dialog" role="navigation"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-body"> <div class="container"> <div class="row"> <div class="col-md-12"> <button aria-label="Close" class="cl
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'externalLinkModalLabel'

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="externalLinkModalLabel" class="modal fade original modal--discrete" id="externalLinkModal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog original" role
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Advancing agricultural innovation in Africa & Asia | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/sustainability/transforming-food-system/advancing-agricultural-innovation-in-africa-and-asia-pacific/
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 475
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://sg.linkedin.com/company/yaraafricaandasia" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="External site, opens in a new window"><img alt="Linkedin in logo in white" class="lazyload" data-src="
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (12 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

Crop and agronomy knowledge | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/crop-nutrition/crop-and-agronomy-knowledge/
Avvik: 118 | Bestått: 478
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/crop-nutrition/crop-and-agronomy-knowledge/how-we-make-our-fertilizer/">Learn more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/crop-nutrition/crop-and-agronomy-knowledge/why-is-fertilizer-important/">Learn more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/crop-nutrition/crop-and-agronomy-knowledge/basic-agronomic-facts/">Learn more</a>

SERIOUS

id="Shape"

SERIOUS

id="Path"

The importance of fertilizer in modern agriculture | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/crop-nutrition/crop-and-agronomy-knowledge/why-is-fertilizer-important/
Avvik: 117 | Bestått: 488
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.gatesnotes.com/Why-I-love-fertilizer" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="External site, opens in a new window">GatesNotes blog post "Why I love fertilizer"</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Read more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/knowledge-grows/five-important-facts-about-fertilizers/">Read more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Read more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/sustainability/transforming-food-system/regenerative-agriculture/">Read more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Read more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/sustainability/transforming-food-system/">Read more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/crop-nutrition/crop-and-agronomy-knowledge/soil-health/">Learn more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

<main>

UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/sustainability/commitments-and-policies/un-sustainable-development-goals/
Avvik: 154 | Bestått: 628
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (53 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="mm-menu mm-mobile mm-menu--country js-mm-menu" data-mobile-country-nav="" data-mobile-menu="" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap"> <div class="mm-mobile__header" data-mobile-he
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="modal-dialog" role="navigation"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-body"> <div class="container"> <div class="row"> <div class="col-md-12"> <button aria-label="Close" class="cl
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'externalLinkModalLabel'

Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Close" class="close close--small" data-bs-dismiss="modal" type="button"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon icon-close icon-close--small"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Protecting people and the environment | HESQ | Safe by Choice | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/this-is-yara/protecting-people-and-the-environment/
Avvik: 89 | Bestått: 454
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/this-is-yara/protecting-people-and-the-environment/safety-data-sheets/">Learn more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/this-is-yara/protecting-people-and-the-environment/explosives-precursors/">Learn more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Search | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/search/
Avvik: 80 | Bestått: 420
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="SearchPageModel connection gdpr-banner-displayed"> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQ4GDCJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width=
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (11 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h4, should start with h1

<h4 class="common-heading">Search</h4>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (66 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQ4GDCJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

MODERATE

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Our history | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/this-is-yara/our-history/
Avvik: 84 | Bestått: 464
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="placeholder-thumbnail" data-cy="placeholder-thumbnail" style="background-image:url('https://img.youtube.com/vi/6voPn7gBd6c/hqdefault.jpg');"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="consent-placeholder" data-category="cookie_cat_marketing" data-cy="consent-placeholder" onclick="CookieConsent.renew()" style="display: block;"> <div class="consent-placeholder-content"> <
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (12 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="white-menu white-menu-hover" data-sticky-header="" tabindex="0"> <div class="white-menu__inner d-flex justify-content-around align-items-center m-auto" data-menu-wrapper=""> <a class="logo
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="mm-submenu mm-mobile js-mm-submenu" data-cy="submenu-mobile" id="mm-submenu" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap scroll-no-scrollbar w-100 h-100"> <div class="navigation-body">

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul class="submenu" role="menu"> <div class="submenu__col d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-start" data-dropdown-col=""> <li class="submenu__category" role="none"> <a class="submen
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

<ul class="submenu" role="menu"> <div class="submenu__col d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-start" data-dropdown-col=""> <li class="submenu__category" role="none"> <a class="submen
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (68 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQ4GDCJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" class="" data-category-consent="cookie_cat_marketing" data-consent-src="http
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="mm-submenu mm-mobile js-mm-submenu" data-cy="submenu-mobile" id="mm-submenu" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap scroll-no-scrollbar w-100 h-100"> <div class="navigation-body">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation-mobile js-mm-menu" data-mobile-menu="" data-mobile-menu-nav="" role="navigation"> <div class="navigation-mobile__wrap"> <div class="navigation-mobile__header"></div> <ul class="
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="mm-menu mm-mobile mm-menu--country js-mm-menu" data-mobile-country-nav="" data-mobile-menu="" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap"> <div class="mm-mobile__header" data-mobile-he
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="modal-dialog" role="navigation"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-body"> <div class="container"> <div class="row"> <div class="col-md-12"> <button aria-label="Close" class="cl
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'externalLinkModalLabel'

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="externalLinkModalLabel" class="modal fade original modal--discrete" id="externalLinkModal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog original" role
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Reminder: Program for the publication of Yara International ASA fourth quarter 2025 results | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/corporate-releases/reminder-program-for-the-publication-of-yara-international-asa-fourth-quarter-2025-results/
Avvik: 81 | Bestått: 420
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://yara.com/investor-relations/latest-quarterly-report/">https://yara.com/investor-relations/latest-quarterly-report/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://registrations.events/direct/Q4I2978392">https://registrations.events/direct/Q4I2978392</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="/link/66b81043794f46088f8e35acfe2418bd.aspx">www.yara.com</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (10 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

iframe is missing title attribute

How partnerships can help decarbonize food value chains | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/knowledge-grows/how-partnerships-can-help-decarbonize-food-value-chains/
Avvik: 78 | Bestått: 431
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (10 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

Commitments and policies | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/sustainability/commitments-and-policies/
Avvik: 102 | Bestått: 484
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (12 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

<div aria-labelledby="Commitments and policies" class="dropdown-menu shadow-fixed-sm"> <div class="row"> <div class="col-md-12"> <div class="sub-menu__header"> <a class="active" href="/sustainability/
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'policies'

<div aria-labelledby="Commitments and policies" class="dropdown-menu shadow-fixed-sm"> <div class="row"> <div class="col-md-12"> <div class="sub-menu__header"> <a class="active" href="/sustainability/
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Digital farming solutions tailored to diverse farming needs | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/digital-farming/our-digital-farming-solutions/
Avvik: 89 | Bestått: 508
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (13 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="fw-bold fade-in-up" data-cy="icon-text-block-title">Crop nutrition management</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="white-menu white-menu-hover" data-sticky-header="" tabindex="0"> <div class="white-menu__inner d-flex justify-content-around align-items-center m-auto" data-menu-wrapper=""> <a class="logo
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="mm-submenu mm-mobile js-mm-submenu" data-cy="submenu-mobile" id="mm-submenu" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap scroll-no-scrollbar w-100 h-100"> <div class="navigation-body">

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.yarabrasil.com.br/noticias-e-eventos/press-releases/atfarm/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="External site, opens in a new window"><span class="EOP SCXW28686062 BCX8" data-c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

How we make our fertilizers | Yara's mineral fertilizer production | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/crop-nutrition/crop-and-agronomy-knowledge/how-we-make-our-fertilizer/
Avvik: 119 | Bestått: 497
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="placeholder-thumbnail" data-cy="placeholder-thumbnail" style="background-image:url('https://img.youtube.com/vi/4YNNy1-8Cy4/hqdefault.jpg');"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (13 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="fw-bold fade-in-up" data-cy="icon-text-block-title">Density</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link

Our opinions | Yara Position Papers | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/sustainability/our-opinions/
Avvik: 114 | Bestått: 521
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (13 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="fw-bold mb-default fade-in-up">Read our position on these topics:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/siteassets/sustainability/position-papers/yaras-position-on-organic-farming.pdf" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Position paper on organic farming">Download position paper on organic f
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Ethics and Compliance in Yara | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/this-is-yara/ethics-and-compliance/
Avvik: 98 | Bestått: 460
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (13 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="fw-bold mb-default fade-in-up">Ethics & Compliance in 2025</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="white-menu white-menu-hover" data-sticky-header="" tabindex="0"> <div class="white-menu__inner d-flex justify-content-around align-items-center m-auto" data-menu-wrapper=""> <a class="logo
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="mm-submenu mm-mobile js-mm-submenu" data-cy="submenu-mobile" id="mm-submenu" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap scroll-no-scrollbar w-100 h-100"> <div class="navigation-body">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul class="submenu" role="menu"> <div class="submenu__col d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-start" data-dropdown-col=""> <li class="submenu__category" role="none"> <a class="submen
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

MODERATE

MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul class="submenu" role="menu"> <div class="submenu__col d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-start" data-dropdown-col=""> <li class="submenu__category" role="none"> <a class="submen
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/this-is-yara/ethics-and-compliance/code-of-conduct/">Learn more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/this-is-yara/ethics-and-compliance/code-of-conduct-for-business-partners/">Learn more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Learn more'

<a class="article-item__cta mt-auto" data-cy="carousel-item-link" href="/this-is-yara/ethics-and-compliance/human-rights/">Learn more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (108 characters)

<a href="/siteassets/ethics-and-compliance/ec-main-landing-page/yaras-ethics-and-compliance-commitment.pdf">Download Yara's Ethics and Compliance Commitment and the 15 elements of our compliance progr
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Shape' appears 5 times

id="Shape"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Path' appears 7 times

id="Path"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (77 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQ4GDCJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="mm-submenu mm-mobile js-mm-submenu" data-cy="submenu-mobile" id="mm-submenu" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap scroll-no-scrollbar w-100 h-100"> <div class="navigation-body">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation-mobile js-mm-menu" data-mobile-menu="" data-mobile-menu-nav="" role="navigation"> <div class="navigation-mobile__wrap"> <div class="navigation-mobile__header"></div> <ul class="
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="mm-menu mm-mobile mm-menu--country js-mm-menu" data-mobile-country-nav="" data-mobile-menu="" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap"> <div class="mm-mobile__header" data-mobile-he
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="modal-dialog" role="navigation"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-body"> <div class="container"> <div class="row"> <div class="col-md-12"> <button aria-label="Close" class="cl
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Key information related to proposed cash dividend to be paid by Yara International ASA | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/corporate-releases/key-information-related-to-proposed-cash-dividend-to-be-paid-by-yara-international-asa5/
Avvik: 83 | Bestått: 425
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/link/66b81043794f46088f8e35acfe2418bd.aspx" target="_blank">Yara.com</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/yara" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<main>

Reports and publications | Sustainability performance | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/sustainability/sustainability-performance/reports-and-publications-2024/
Avvik: 106 | Bestått: 478
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

Data table has no caption or label

<table> <thead> <tr> <th>Document</th> <th>Date added</th> <th>Language</th> </tr> </thead> <tbody> <tr> <td> <span class="table-cell-label"> Document:

<th>Document</th>

Podcasts | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/news-and-media/media-library/podcasts/
Avvik: 86 | Bestått: 459
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (12 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (72 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQ4GDCJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="mm-submenu mm-mobile js-mm-submenu" data-cy="submenu-mobile" id="mm-submenu" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap scroll-no-scrollbar w-100 h-100"> <div class="navigation-body">

Privacy and legal | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/privacy-and-legal/
Avvik: 91 | Bestått: 433
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (13 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="fw-bold mb-default fade-in-up">Here you will find all privacy policies and terms of use of this website and Yara products</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

SERIOUS

Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

Yara reports strong fourth quarter and full year results | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/corporate-releases/yara-reports-strong-fourth-quarter-and-full-year-results/
Avvik: 87 | Bestått: 428
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="/link/93e6307467b7414cb3aa1a1e431a35e4.aspx" target="_blank">https://www.yara.com/investor-relations/latest-quarterly-report/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/link/93e6307467b7414cb3aa1a1e431a35e4.aspx" target="_blank">https://www.yara.com/investor-relations/latest-quarterly-report/</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/link/66b81043794f46088f8e35acfe2418bd.aspx" target="_blank">Yara.com</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<main>

Our history | Yara International

https://www.yara.com/this-is-yara/our-history/
Avvik: 84 | Bestått: 464
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="placeholder-thumbnail" data-cy="placeholder-thumbnail" style="background-image:url('https://img.youtube.com/vi/6voPn7gBd6c/hqdefault.jpg');"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="logo-tagline" fill="#fff" viewbox="0 0 88 11" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M6.5 8.1c0 .1-.1.1-.1.1H4.7c-.1 0-.2-.1-.2-.1L2.1 5h-.4v3c0 .1-.1.1-.2.1H.1C0 8.1 0 8.1 0 8V.7S0
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="/"> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <svg aria-label="Yara" id="Layer_1" role="img" style="enable-background:new 0 0 70.9 70.9" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 70.9 70.9" x="0" xml:space="p
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<div> with onclick has no tabindex - not keyboard focusable

<div class="consent-placeholder" data-category="cookie_cat_marketing" data-cy="consent-placeholder" onclick="CookieConsent.renew()" style="display: block;"> <div class="consent-placeholder-content"> <
Add tabindex='0' to make element focusable, or use a button/link
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (12 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="white-menu white-menu-hover" data-sticky-header="" tabindex="0"> <div class="white-menu__inner d-flex justify-content-around align-items-center m-auto" data-menu-wrapper=""> <a class="logo
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul class="submenu" role="menu"> <div class="submenu__col d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-start" data-dropdown-col=""> <li class="submenu__category" role="none"> <a class="submen
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (68 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-TQ4GDCJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" class="" data-category-consent="cookie_cat_marketing" data-consent-src="http
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="mm-submenu mm-mobile js-mm-submenu" data-cy="submenu-mobile" id="mm-submenu" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap scroll-no-scrollbar w-100 h-100"> <div class="navigation-body">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="navigation-mobile js-mm-menu" data-mobile-menu="" data-mobile-menu-nav="" role="navigation"> <div class="navigation-mobile__wrap"> <div class="navigation-mobile__header"></div> <ul class="
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="mm-menu mm-mobile mm-menu--country js-mm-menu" data-mobile-country-nav="" data-mobile-menu="" role="navigation"> <div class="mm-mobile__wrap"> <div class="mm-mobile__header" data-mobile-he
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<div class="modal-dialog" role="navigation"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-body"> <div class="container"> <div class="row"> <div class="col-md-12"> <button aria-label="Close" class="cl
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

aria-labelledby references non-existent ID: 'externalLinkModalLabel'

<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="externalLinkModalLabel" class="modal fade original modal--discrete" id="externalLinkModal" role="dialog" tabindex="-1"> <div class="modal-dialog original" role
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Close" class="close close--small" data-bs-dismiss="modal" type="button"> <span aria-hidden="true" class="icon icon-close icon-close--small"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="targetUrl" href="" title="You are now leaving yara.com"></a>

<a class="flag-container shadow-hover shadow-hover--sm text-center country-picker-link" href="https://www.yara.co.zm/" rel="nofollow" title="Zambia"> <img alt="Flag of Zambia" src="/Frontend/assets/im
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
